creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption: The BEST NYC Day Trip to 7 Beaches without a car - 40 Minutes/$58 Round-Trip #nyc #NewYork #daytrip #travel #nybucketlist

transcription.text: Did you know that if you take this 40-minute boat ride from Midtown Manhattan Past the Statue of Liberty get out at Sandy Hook take this free shuttle bus You'll end up in a place with seven different beaches with no beach pass needed some of which are the main swimming beach the serene unused beach the fishing beach and a nude beach But it gets even better because you can also explore seven miles of nature trails where I saw this Fox the oldest lighthouse in America and the retired military base Fort Hancock. This is the Sandy Hook Sea Street day trip
